extracted_information: CodeSandbox CDE (Cloud Development Environment) is a complete rewrite of CodeSandbox, launched after 2.5 years of development. It aims to provide instant cloud development environments with usage-based billing, empowering teams with improved productivity and collaboration.

specifications.vm_performance: More than twice as powerful in the Free plan compared to previous versions.
specifications.vm_sizes: Option to pick from different VM sizes, up to 16 vCPUs + 32 GB RAM in the Pro plan, with larger options for Enterprise.
specifications.environment_spin_up_time: 2 seconds for dedicated cloud environments for every branch & PR.
specifications.deployment_preview_wake_up_time: 2 seconds from idle state due to Firecracker memory snapshotting.

pricing.credit_system: Implemented to translate VM runtime per hour into precise costs.

free_plan_inclusions.vm_usage: 40 hours of free VM usage (Nano VMs) every month.
free_plan_inclusions.collaboration: Live collaboration and live coding sessions in Devboxes.
free_plan_inclusions.editor_integration: CodeSandbox VS Code extension (use local VS Code as CDE editor).

pro_plan_details.starting_price: $9 per month for an entire workspace of up to 20 collaborators (base includes 40 hours of VM runtime).
pro_plan_details.scaling_options: On-demand credits (up to defined maximum monthly spend) or purchase add-ons with discounted credit packages.

pricing.codesandbox_friends_program: Provides unlimited Sandboxes to eligible projects (licensed open-source software, developer community projects, non-profit organizations) and discounts for Education.

features: Instant cloud development environments, automatically provisioning a VM for every branch.
Dedicated cloud environments for every branch & PR, available and collaborative 24/7.
Environments accessible via a sharable URL.
Faster context switching: unique environment per branch, eliminating need for stashing changes, running migrations, or installing dependencies.
Multiplayer by default: enables live coding and pair programming.
Faster PR reviews: direct link from GitHub PR to a running, collaborative cloud environment for quick reviews, comments, and commits.
Deployment previews for the entire stack (back-end services, databases, Redis, etc.) automatically provisioned for every PR.
Idle deployment previews are paused and wake up in 2 seconds.
AI features: Boxy coding assistant and Codeium autocomplete (included in Free plan).
Live collaboration and live coding sessions in Devboxes.
VS Code extension for local VS Code as the CodeSandbox CDE editor.
Support for DevContainers for environment configuration.

temporal_info.codesandbox_cde_official_release: Today (date of article publication, not specified numerically but implied as current release).

references: Together AI (CodeSandbox is now part of)
CodeSandbox SDK (launched in conjunction with Together AI partnership)
Firecracker VMs (core technology for powering development environments)
GitHub PRs (integration point for environment provisioning and reviews)
